description_long: This is a rectangular cigarette pack with a predominantly red and white color scheme. The front features a bold red triangle at the top, a black compass-like star symbol, and the brand name 'Marlon' in large black letters, with 'FILTER CIGARETTES' and '20 CLASS A CIGARETTES' written above and below, respectively. The back of the pack displays a similar red triangle design, with a boxed warning label reading 'SMOKING KILLS' in black text. One side of the pack has a vertical barcode, while the other side is plain with only the red and white color split. The surface appears to be made of glossy cardboard, typical of commercial cigarette packaging, and the pack is likely filled with individual cigarettes inside. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible damage, burn marks, or ash.
description: A rectangular, glossy red and white cigarette box labeled 'Marlon' with a star logo and health warning. The pack is clean, with a barcode on one side and no visible damage or burn marks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Marlon' brand, star logo, and product details on a red and white background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a vertical barcode on the lower half of the pack.
description_view_2: Back view featuring a red triangle and a boxed 'SMOKING KILLS' warning.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain with only the red and white color split and no additional markings.
attribute_brand_logo: The front displays the brand name 'Marlon' in large black letters with a black compass-like star symbol above it.
